site.name: Estou Na Torcida
home.meta.title: Create Your Brazil Support Image! - Estou Na Torcida
home.meta.description: Support Brazil during the World Cup by creating your personalized image for free in just 3 steps.
home.hero.title: Create Your Personalized Image Supporting Brazil
home.hero.description: Choose a player, choose a phrase, and show your support for Brazil by posting photos and stories on your social networks!
home.hero.highlight: Create as many images as you want, for free!
footer.accessibilityLabel: Copyright Estou na Torcida created with love by Gus
social.title: Sign in with a social network
social.description: This shows your photo and name on the personalized image. None of your data will be stored.
social.connected: {firstName}, the connection worked. Continue to the next steps.
player.title: Choose a national team player
player.description: This player will appear in your image. You can choose anyone, even the coach.
phrase.title: Choose a support phrase
phrase.description: This phrase will be part of your sticker and will show your support as a fan.
share.title: Share your sticker on social media
share.description: You have 3 sticker formats: one like the preview, one for feed posts, and one for stories.
privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy - Estou Na Torcida
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.paragraph.1: Your privacy is important to us. It is Estou Na Torcida's policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you on the Estou Na Torcida website and other sites we own and operate.
privacy.paragraph.2: We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide you with a service. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also explain why we are collecting it and how it will be used.
privacy.paragraph.3: We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide the requested service. When we store data, we protect it within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss, theft, unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use, or modification.
privacy.paragraph.4: We do not share personally identifiable information publicly or with third parties, except when required by law.
privacy.paragraph.5: Our website may link to external sites that are not operated by us. Please be aware that we have no control over the content and practices of those sites and cannot accept responsibility for their respective privacy policies.
privacy.paragraph.6: You are free to refuse our request for personal information, understanding that we may be unable to provide some of the desired services.
privacy.paragraph.7: Your continued use of our website will be considered acceptance of our practices around privacy and personal information. If you have any questions about how we handle user data and personal information, please contact us.
privacy.commitment.title: User Commitment
privacy.commitment.intro: The user commits to making appropriate use of the content and information that Estou Na Torcida offers on the site, including but not limited to:
privacy.commitment.itemA: A) Not engaging in activities that are illegal or contrary to good faith and public order;
privacy.commitment.itemB: B) Not distributing propaganda or content of a racist or xenophobic nature, gambling content, any type of illegal pornography, apology for terrorism, or content against human rights;
privacy.commitment.itemC: C) Not causing damage to the physical systems (hardware) or logical systems (software) of Estou Na Torcida, its suppliers, or third parties, nor introducing or spreading computer viruses or any other hardware or software systems capable of causing the aforementioned damage.
privacy.more.title: More Information
privacy.more.paragraph: We hope this is clear, and as mentioned earlier, if there is something you are not sure whether you need or not, it is usually safer to keep cookies enabled in case you interact with one of the features you use on our site.
privacy.effectiveDate: This policy is effective as of November 2, 2022 at 10:00, Brasilia time.
